title: iberis pectinata
intro: Iberis pectinata, also known as rock candy or candytuft, is a flowering plant in the mustard family that grows in rocky, well-drained areas and produces pink, white, or purple flowers. Traditionally, Iberis pectinata has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting respiratory health. Iberis pectinata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall well-being.
